description: Style NoteCrafted from finest quality, these arrow wallets are the latest rage this year because of its sophisticated design. This wallet does more than just store your money and credit cards.Product DetailsBrown two-fold wallet with two main compartments, multiple card holders, insert pockets and two id card holders on the leftBranding on the frontMaterial and CareLeatheretteWipe surface with dry clean cloth to avoid dust and stainsDo not store in direct sunlightSizeHeight: 9 cm Width: 11 cm
